## CryptoUtils.Converters.namedSecret variable

Converter for [named secret](./ts-extras.cryptoutils.inamedsecret.md) from JSON representation. Expects key as base64 string in JSON, converts to Uint8Array.

**Signature:**

```typescript
namedSecret: Converter<INamedSecret>
```
